hyperedges.label: Theme & Visual Customization System
hyperedges.description: The interconnected system for dynamic theme/color/animation customization: global theme form feeds CSS variable binding, live JS binding pushes changes to iframe, which applies them via CSS variables and class toggling.

hyperedges.label: Editor & Preview Architecture
hyperedges.description: The core app architecture: single HTML file with CSS Grid layout, left editor pane, right iframe preview with device switcher toggle, and live data binding between form inputs and template.

hyperedges.label: Agent Upgrade Workflow
hyperedges.description: The set of prompt-helper files that guide template customization: trigger-based agent instructions, user customization queries, and seed template integration prompts.

hyperedges.label: Share standard wedding invitation sections: Cover, Countdown, Couple, Holy Verse (Ar-Rum:21), Events (Akad/Resepsi), Gallery, RSVP, Gifts, Live Streaming, Wishes, Closing
Editor templates use identical architecture: form panel + iframe preview + postMessage for live data binding
Parallax 3D tilt effect is used across both modern cinematic and traditional cultural templates with mouse-tracking transforms

nodes.label: Global Theme & Visual Effects Form Group
nodes.norm_label: global theme & visual effects form group

nodes.label: Dynamic CSS Variable Binding
nodes.rationale: CSS variables injected into :root allow instant theme updates without iframe reload. All template elements must reference these variables for real-time color changes.

nodes.label: Template Agent (Wedding Invitation Editor & Preview App)
nodes.norm_label: template agent (wedding invitation editor & preview app)

nodes.label: Wedding Invitation Editor & Preview App
nodes.rationale: The core product: a single HTML file with live editor (left pane) and live preview (right pane). Uses CSS Grid 40/60 split, iframe preview, and live data binding via form inputs with e- prefix convention.

nodes.label: Iframe Preview System
nodes.rationale: Wedding code goes inside <template id='invitation-template'> and is injected into an iframe via srcdoc. Enables isolated preview without affecting editor DOM.

nodes.label: Live Binding (input events to iframe updateInvitation)
nodes.norm_label: live binding (input events to iframe updateinvitation)

nodes.label: Cinematic Dark Theme
nodes.rationale: Editor and preview share a cinematic dark aesthetic: bg #0a0807, gold #c9a961, cream #f5ecd9. Fonts: Cormorant Garamond, Jost, Italiana. Ensures visual consistency between editor and invitation.

nodes.label: Global Theme & Visual Effects Form Group (Section 0)
nodes.norm_label: global theme & visual effects form group (section 0)

nodes.label: Live Visual Binding JS
nodes.rationale: Listens to input/change events on color pickers, theme selectors, overlay dropdowns. Calls window.updateInvitation(data) inside iframe to update CSS variables directly without reload.
